feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Service Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Service Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud and Service Cloud v2 Supplement
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are running the v2 trial and rather interested. Here is a public document that we have found https://assets.cdn.sap.com/agreements/product-use-and-support-terms/cls/en/sap-sales-cloud-and-sap-service-cloud-version-2-supplement-english-v12-2023.pdf

Tried to ask the SAP Sales Rep, no luck at all. Hoping to see if anyone would know anything about these?

  1. SAP Build App base package listed on point 1.1. – would anyone knows if this is the one being referred by? https://store.sap.com/dcp/en/product/000000000008900305

  1. Data storage listed on point 1.4 - Where from the system or SAP Me page, that we can see our data storage consumption?

  1. User License – Limited use listed as 1.4 and 1.8, what is the product ID? There are only 2 product IDs listed on the onboarding guide. Never seen there is another Limited use product ID on the onboarding guide.

  1. Definition of “API calls” or “Event calls” on 1.7, do they mean inbound to CRM only? What is the Product ID for the additional license on this clause? On the system, where can we monitor this API and Event calls consumption?

  1. Definition of transaction for this Cloud Service on 1.8 clause. When it says “transactions are cases, phone calls, emails, tasks, etc…” , how is the system counting? For example: a user created a case? A user got assigned to a case as Owner? How to count when the assignment is a Team (i.e. more than 1 user)? A user modified a case? A user closed a case?

entry.title: Cloud Service Order Form
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Here we would like to understand more how would you help to resolve the legal confusions on the SAP Cloud Service order form? Example:

Our legal's confusion is that there are so many reference documents links to form the agreement, such as support, supplement, etc. But when you click on the links, it can be a page with many many documents, i.e. Support - https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/agreements/cloud/cloud-services.html?sort=latest_desc&search=Support

and our legal team is asking "do we need to read all documents on this all portal?"

Personally I think it is a valid question. But unsure why, SAP legal team will not provide the 1 relevant document reference. Hence, wanting to see if anyone else would have the same issue before and how to facilitate this? We did try to discuss with the SAP AE, but feedback was "oh, all other customers signed this order form without issues", which I am not too sure if it is appropriate feedback at all.

Many thanks!

entry.title: How to create a maintenance plan for ticket creation on a quarterly basis for next quarter?
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We have a requirement to create a maintenance plan, which should create tickets in advanced on a quarterly basis for the next quarter.

For example:

We have 3 registered products which are getting maintenance on a yearly basis. For example in Q1 2024 the following 3 Registered Products have the following ‘maintenance dates’:

RP 1: 15.01.2024

RP 2: 08.02.2024

RP 3: 20.03.2024

Instead of creating tickets based on the actual maintenance dates of each product, we thought of the following scenario.

One month before Q1 2024, the maintenance plan should check before each quarter which maintenance dates are within the next quarter and then create tickets with the same time span (01.01. – 31.03.). In our example it should create the following (same) 3 tickets:

RP 1: Earliest Start date 01.01.2024

Latest End date 31.03.2024

RP 2: Earliest Start date 01.01.2024

Latest End date 31.03.2024

RP 3: Earliest Start date 01.01.2024

Latest End date 31.03.2024

Is this possible with standard functionality of maintenance plans in SAP C4C?

entry.title: If an e-mail channel is active but no ticket type was selected what will happen receiving an e-mail
entry.content:
Hello experts,

creating an e-mail channel but not setup the ticket type on that channel, when an e-mail arrives for that channel what ticket type will be set?

Is a B2C channel and there's two ticket types setup in the tenant.

I can't send an e-mail to that channel since this is a productive customer tenant.

Did search on internet, community and even the manual from SAP Service Cloud and there's no reference for this question.

Thank you for your support.

Regards,

Eduardo

entry.title: How to transfer Organizational Structure from SAP C4C PROD to C4C Test tenant
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please let me know the process to transfer Organizational Structure from SAP C4C PROD to C4C Test tenant.

Is it possible to transfer certain Sales Office and Sales Group details of Org Structure from one SAP C4C tenant to other tenant.

 

Regards,

Muheed Syed

entry.title: How to publish a query in SAP CX Cloud
entry.content:
It just allows you to publish the standard query,

How do you publish the customized queries?

entry.title: Data Migration of In-house repairs
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We're implementing S4hana public cloud and we're preparing the first data migration dry run.

In the list of available objects for data migration provided in the Sap Help (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/20607b6de19a4d34a41b0abec6186b01.html) I didn't find any object related to the repair flow (scope item 3XK) e.g. In-house repair, repair order, repair quote etc.

What's the best practice to migrate/mass create open In-house repairs from the legacy system?

Thank you

entry.title: How to identify report names in SAP C4C in which a particular KUT field is available?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to identify report names in SAP C4C in which a particular KUT field is available?

Under 'Reporting', we can check in which data sources that field is exposed. I believe it doesn't mean that KUT field is available in all the report in which that data source is used.

Path: Adaptation >> Selecting particular KUT Field >> Edit >> Reporting

Kindly assist and correct me if my understanding is wrong.

entry.title: How to change the language in (free) demo/trial system?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have ordered the SAP Service Cloud V2 as a trial/demo-system via this page SAP Service Cloud | Free Trial . It is linked with my S-User ID / Universal ID.

Currently the interface is German, but I would like to change it to English. Unfortunately this is not possible within the system itself at the "user settings"-menu item on the very top right.

==> Could anyone help / advice here? 

Thanks a lot!

 

(1) Steps how to login(2) After login, opening user settings(3) Menu items within "user settings" - but no possibility to change the language

entry.title: bachelor's thesis on Resource-Related Billing in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently writing my bachelor's thesis on Resource-Related Billing in SAP S/4HANA.

My guiding questions are:

  • How will the replacement of DIP profiles in SAP ERP ECC by the successor system SAP S/4HANA look?
  • What does Resource-Related Billing look like in SAP S/4HANA? what are the possibilities?

I am looking for helpful approaches for this. Does anyone have any ideas?

If you are familiar with the topic, I would be very grateful if you could answer a questionnaire from me in writing. Please contact me if you are interested 😊

I would also appreciate it if you share or forward my request.

Thank you very much in advance.

Nora

entry.title: Implementation of Domain Warning Message for Non-Business Required Email Addresses on Ticket Screen
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

At the interaction level on the ticket screen, when a user enters a domain in the "To" field that is not business-required, we need to display a warning message (as a pop / Dialog box ) asking if they wish to proceed.

is it possible to enhance as per the requirememt?
Attached img for reference. 








Regards,
Tanuja T.

entry.title: Sales Cloud Version 2 odata for create Case type - Notes error
entry.content:
I have an issue in create a case service in Sales Cloud V2, in the parameters, always receiving an error that Note ID is invalid, which Note ID should be added?
I either get an error called NoteID provided in the description is not  valid, Please enter a valid noteID
and An internal server error occurred while running the note service.


I need to know how to save details in the Notes and also is there any more documentation about the ODATA APIS for V2 as this link :https://api.sap.com/package/SAPSalesServiceCloudV2/rest is not enough?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Enable "convert to new ticket" for e-mails initiated by employee - service cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

is it possible, and if yes how, to enable the button "convert to new ticket" for emails initiated by employee?

Currently we see this option only for emails initiated by customer within the ticket interaction / timeline tab. See screenshots. 

If an internal colleague does give input on the customer service ticket and this leads to a new ticket, is it possible to enable or activate this somehow? 

 

email initiated by employee, from ticket tab interaction

open details, action greyed out

email initiated by customer, convertion to new ticket possible

 

 

 

Thanks.

Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: Do we need to create Business user in SAP C4C to access Channel Partner Portal?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

Could you please let me know if we need to create business user in SAP C4C to access Channel Partner Portal.

 

Is the user who access Channel Partner Portal consumes C4C license?

 

Regards,

Muheed Syed

entry.title: How to send external customer number when calling a mashup?
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

we want to build an app via SAP Build and use it as a mashup in SAP Sales & Service Cloud v2. We want to pass the currently selected customer number to the app. In our case it's: Give us all equipments linked to that specific customer from SAP S/4HANA

Do you have any idea whether this can be realized and how this can be implemented? Thank you in advance!

Best Regards

Sebastian

SAP Build SAP Build Apps

entry.title: Is SAP automatically consider the unassociated counted user as limited license or enterprise edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I have a couple of queries related to C4C License Subscription. 

Could you please assist. 

We have purchased limited license edition and Enterprise Edition. 

 

What happens if we don't assign any license subscription to the counted user in C4C? Will SAP automatically consider the unassociated counted user as limited license or enterprise edition based on the activities that user has performed. 

 

If we have assigned a counted user with Enterprise edition but that user has not exceeded more than 400 dialog steps in a month, will SAP automatically consider that user as Limited edition instead of Enterprise edition.

 

If we have assigned a counted user with limited edition subscription but the user has exceeded 400 dialog steps in month, will SAP automatically consider that user as Enterprise edition user instead of Limited edition.

entry.title: Additional fee for multiple users?
entry.content:
I am using AWS Cloud Service for using an appliance "SAP S/4HANA 2022 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance".

In the account using this cloud service, I have 3 users.

And 3 users need to use cloud simultaneously.

What I wonder is, does the number of users affect the cloud hosting fee?

entry.title: Service Cloud: Save Query as Default for Page Layout / Business Role
entry.content:
Hello all, 

is it possible as administrator to save a query, e.g. query XX for the ticket list, and use it as default query for a certain page layout or business role? 

I want to assure that the certain ticket list filter is used by the whole team. But, if I adapt the master layout and change the standard query for showing the ticket list (Service - Tickets - Advanced Search- Organize Queries), the other users dont have the same default query. Only my admin user itself sees the default query. Other users can see the query XX, but dont have the same default setting... 

Is this an issue due to personalization? Is it possible to overwrite the personalization?


Thanks for help!

Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: Support Portal for C4C Integration
entry.content:
Hi,

I found this old blog (Support site – easy to create, easy to consume, fu... - SAP Community) about the Support Portal of C4C. I just want to ask if this is still applicable or a valid blog. If yes, is there any updated documentation regarding the support portal functionality?

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Case Creation in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Use case : To demo an end to end flow of Customer experience for a B2C website using the following systems S/4HANA, SAP Commerce Cloud, Field Service Management (FSM), Service Cloud V2

Below are the queries for SAP Service Cloud V2:

1. How  can I  create tickets once the sales order is delivered  instead of creating manually?
2. Is there a way where I can add products/serviceable products to a case(service tickets) as I can see we are able to add only registered products now into an case.
